plan.caption:
Mewtwo Star from EX Holon Phantoms is worth $7,100. For one card.

It is one of the rarest pulls in the set, and the artwork is why collectors chase it.

Would you keep it or sell it? Tell us below.

pokeev.com runs the live Expected Value on every set, so you know exactly what your pulls are worth.
link in bio -> pokeev.com

brief.cardBody: EX Holon Phantoms's crown jewel.|The card the whole set chases.
brief.craftBody: A dense white starburst anchors the upper left of the art, radiating light into surrounding colored star clusters | the holographic foil amplifies every point of light in this region
brief.sceneBody: Mewtwo hovers weightless against a dense starfield of scattered color | its pale lavender form glows softly against the dark cosmic background
brief.oddsBody: Rip a sealed booster and|the odds are 214 to 1.
